历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3372 → 4754 → 17551 → 17242 → 17381. In 2023, due to Anhui Province's first new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant drop (from 4754 to 17551). From 2024 to 2025, it stabilized in the 17200–17400 range. The 2025 baseline is about 17381, with a fluctuation of less than 200 places in the past two years, indicating that the ranking has stabilized under the new exam model. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province was 124 in 2021 → 116 in 2022 → 123 in 2023 → 133 in 2024 → 137 in 2025 → 123 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a reduction of 14 students (-10.2%), which is a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly and causing the ranking number to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 25th (stable at 24–26 in recent years), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism and theft), admission cutoff signals, and interview discrimination incidents. However, its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms. The 'China's Most Beautiful University' label continues to attract attention. Positive and negative public opinion coexist, and overall application attention remains high. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Mathematics A-, Law A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, and Marxist Theory A-. Among them, Statistics, Chemistry, and Marine Science are highly correlated with Physics Category enrollment majors (Statistics, Chemistry, Marine Science, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024), matching Xiamen University's Physics Category enrollment majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, Engineering Experimental Class, and Science Experimental Class (Medical). In 2026, the total number of examinees in Anhui Province is 451,000 (about 313,000 for Physics Category, a slight decrease of about 2.4% from 320,779 in 2025), with a small reduction in examinee scale. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, not a local university. In 2025, the enrollment proportion in Anhui Province is about 5.4% (137 out of total national enrollment), placing it in the mid-to-high range among provinces. Fujian and Anhui are geographically close, with no obvious disadvantage in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17381, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment reduction of 10.2% (causing the ranking to move forward by about 1065 places to 16316), the coexistence of negative reputation and high Douyin popularity (attention remains high), and a slight decrease in the total number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 16266, with a range of 15766–16766.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Statistics (including Economic Statistics, Statistics, Data Science)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Accounting (including Accounting, Finance, Auditing)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information)
- Economics (including Finance, Public Finance, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Computer)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Science Experimental Class (Medical) (including Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Traditional Chinese Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Marine and Ecological Environment)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Pharmaceutical Health)
- Chemistry (including Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Physics (including Physics, Astronomy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15766–16766, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Economics, Mathematics, Medical) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Statistics, Computer Science, Accounting, Law) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Marine, Life Sciences, Chemical Engineering and Materials, Energy and Power, Physics) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 15766), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 519 → 520 → 2496 → 2795 → 2382. In 2023, due to Anhui's first new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant drop (from 520 to 2496). From 2024 to 2025, it fluctuated in the 2380–2800 range. The 2025 baseline is about 2382, an improvement of about 413 places compared to 2024 (2795), showing a recovery trend. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui: 2021: 33, 2022: 31, 2023: 34, 2024: 37, 2025: 36, 2026: 26. In 2026, enrollment is reduced by 10 (27.8%) compared to 2025. This significant reduction theoretically eases competition, and the ranking number should move forward considerably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 25th (stable at 24–26 in recent years), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving campus safety, admission cutoff signals, and other public opinion. However, its Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), and the 'China's Most Beautiful University' label continues to attract attention. Both positive and negative public opinions coexist, and overall application attention remains high. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above, highly relevant to History Category majors including: Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Law A-, Sociology A-, Marxist Theory A-, etc. Majors such as Accounting (Business Administration A), Economics (Applied Economics A), and Law (Law A-) have outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, Accounting/Finance/Auditing are socially popular or recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Anhui is 451,000 (History Category about 138,000, slightly down about 2.4% from 141,400 in 2025), with a small reduction in candidate scale. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen, Fujian Province, not a local university in Anhui. Fujian and Anhui are geographically close, with no obvious disadvantage in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2382, the significant 27.8% enrollment reduction in History Category in 2026 (which would move the ranking forward by about 397 places to 1985), the coexistence of negative reputation and high Douyin popularity, and a slight decrease in total candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 1955, with a range of 1759–2151.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1759), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
